changeFromPrevious: Added R10 (rngBlockHeight) for reveal window enforcement. Limits house block-grinding window to (timeoutHeight - rngBlockHeight) blocks.

registerLayout.R8: timeoutHeight (Int) - timeout height for refund (~100 blocks from bet)
registerLayout.R10: rngBlockHeight (Int) - pre-committed reveal height (earliest block house can reveal, ~70 blocks from bet)

securityImprovements: Reveal height pre-commitment (R10) limits house block-grinding
Shorter effective grinding window (30 blocks vs unbounded in v2)
Reveal window enforced on-chain: HEIGHT >= rngBlockHeight && HEIGHT <= timeoutHeight
